items.title: Palantir Is Breaking The Rule Of 40—And That May Be The Bigger Story Than AI
items.summary: AI is the headline. The math might be the real story. Palantir Technologies Inc. just reported a Rule of 40 score of 145% — a software-industry yardstick that adds revenue growth to operating margin, with 40 considered the bar. Palantir didn’t just beat the benchmark, it stretched it. In software, 40% is considered healthy. Even top-tier companies land in the 60–80% range. Palantir is operating in a different zone. items.title_kr: Palantir는 40의 법칙을 깨고 있습니다. 이는 AI보다 더 큰 이야기일 수 있습니다.
